heading: Status of reserve cities under former statutes
label: 224 Status of reserve cities under former statutes
text: The organization of reserve districts and Federal reserve cities shall not be construed as changing the present status of reserve cities except in so far as this chapter changes the amount of reserves that may be carried with approved reserve agents located therein.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , known as the Federal Reserve Act.
